original_task: Go to 'https://analytics.google.com/analytics/web/?pli=1#/a124382116p344748848/reports/explorer?params=_u..nav%3Dmaui%26_u.comparisonOption%3Ddisabled%26_u.date00%3D20260202%26_u.date01%3D20260215%26_r.explorerCard..rowsPerPage%3D25&collectionId=10591830489&ruid=all-pages-and-screens,life-cycle,engagement&r=all-pages-and-screens'. Type in the date range from Feb 23, 2026 to Mar 1, 2026.  in the date range selector (Use the following format E.g. Feb 2, 2026 - Feb 9, 2026). Then click Apply (use javascript to find and click the apply button as the coordinate clicks and enter key will not work). Please wait for the table to reload after you have clicked apply. If you read that the first row is 13,091 for /encroll-acoustic-adventure, then you have not waited and must wait longer before reading the table. If you have waited and still see this, ensure the date changed has applied and try again. Once you have confirmed the table has reloaded and you don't see 13,091, go through the table and return the page views for the top 15 urls for newly generated table.  The page views are in the 'Views' column, that sits next to 'Active User' column. Please  return the views in the views column, and the url associated to the view count.
